title: Welcome to Caliber!
lines: Caliber is your AI agent's memory. It analyzes your repo,
learns from every session, and keeps your agent context
fresh, grounded, and personal to your project.

title: Understanding Your Project
lines: Right now, Caliber is reading your repo — file structure,
languages, tools, and conventions. This fingerprint is the
foundation everything else builds on.

title: Tailored Configs
lines: That understanding becomes CLAUDE.md and .cursor/rules/ —
personalized instructions your agent reads before every task.
Not generic templates. Configs shaped to your codebase.

title: Skills for Your Workflow
lines: Beyond configs, Caliber generates skills — focused
instructions for deploying, migrating, or reviewing code,
shaped to your project. Browse more with `caliber skills`.

title: Learns from Every Session
lines: Caliber watches your agent work. When something goes wrong
— a tool fails, you correct a mistake — it captures the
lesson so the same mistake never happens twice.

title: Gets Smarter Over Time
lines: Learnings accumulate in CALIBER_LEARNINGS.md and feed back
into your configs automatically. The more you use your agent,
the better it gets. Your whole team benefits.

title: Stays in Sync
lines: Your code evolves, so your configs should too.
`caliber refresh` reads recent changes and updates configs
to match. Set it as a hook and forget about it.

title: Runs in CI
lines: Add Caliber to your GitHub pipeline. It scores every PR,
catches config drift, and blocks merges when agent quality
drops. `caliber score --compare main` shows the delta.

title: Measures What Matters
lines: `caliber score` checks config quality — grounding, accuracy,
freshness. `caliber insights` goes further: task success rate,
failure trends, and proof that your agent is improving.
